CheckTitle: Okta password policies check passwords against common-password dictionaries
Description: **Okta Password Policy common-password checks** should be enabled in every active policy so users cannot choose known weak passwords.
Risk: **Disabled common-password checks** make credential guessing easier because users governed by weaker policies can select passwords already present in attacker dictionaries.

Code.Other: Security > Authentication > Password: edit each active password policy and adjust password settings to the STIG requirement.

Recommendation.Text: **Enable common-password dictionary checks in every active Okta Password Policy** and keep weaker legacy policies disabled or out of assignment scope.
